title: NIMHANS Recruitment 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for Project Associate Posts
description: National Institute of Mental Health and Neurosciences (NIMHANS) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for Project Associate Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the Post Graduation can grab this chance and apply for the NIMHANS Recruitment 2026 . Here, we include the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. If you are looking for more, here is a list of Government Jobs in 2...
